# CyberCover.co.nz — NZ Cyber Insurance Specialist

## Overview
CyberCover.co.nz is a specialist cyber insurance comparison and broker referral service for New Zealand businesses of all sizes. Operated by Cover4You, a trading style of GDS (NZ owned and operated).

## Purpose
Help NZ businesses find the right cyber insurance through licensed broker advice. Core KPI: qualified lead generation via form submissions sent to licensed NZ insurance advisors.

## Key Facts
- Service type: Broker referral (not an insurer or underwriter)
- Market: New Zealand only
- Target: Businesses of all sizes — from sole traders to large enterprises
- Insurer panel: Chubb, AIG, Zurich, Delta Insurance, QBE, Berkley Insurance
- Broker fees: May apply on some products — disclosed upfront
- Form submissions: hello@cover4you.co.nz
- Regulatory: Financial advice provided by Cover4You, registered financial advice provider (FMCA)

## NZ Cyber Market Context
- 53% of NZ businesses experienced a cyber incident in 2025
- Average data breach cost: $173,000 for NZ businesses
- Only 6% of NZ small businesses have cyber insurance
- Privacy Act 2020: mandatory breach notification obligations apply to all NZ businesses
- Ransomware increased 50% globally in 2025
- BEC (business email compromise) is NZ's most common cyber claim

## Coverage Types
1. Data Breach Response — forensics, legal, notification, credit monitoring
2. Ransomware & Cyber Extortion — negotiation, payment (with guidance), restoration
3. Business Interruption — lost revenue during system downtime
4. Third-Party Cyber Liability — privacy claims from affected customers
5. Social Engineering / BEC — invoice fraud, payment diversion, CEO fraud
6. Regulatory Defence — Privacy Commissioner investigations and fines
7. Crisis Management — PR, media, brand recovery

## Business Types Covered (19 industry pages)
small-business, healthcare, legal-firms, accounting-finance, retail-ecommerce, hospitality, construction, education, nonprofits, professional-services, manufacturing, technology, property-management, financial-services, trades, logistics-transport, media-marketing, aged-care, engineering, real-estate

## Insurers Compared
- Chubb (enterprise, most comprehensive)
- AIG (CyberEdge, cyber specialist)
- Zurich (SME and mid-market, NZ-based claims)
- Delta Insurance (NZ specialist, local expertise)
- QBE (professional services and trades)
- Berkley Insurance (technology and professional)

## Site URLs
- / — Home (lead capture + overview)
- /coverage/ — Coverage guide (7 coverage types explained)
- /compare/ — Insurer comparison with feature matrix
- /businesses/ — Business type index
- /businesses/[slug]/ — 19 industry-specific pages
- /blog/ — Cyber insurance articles and guides
- /blog/[slug]/ — 6 blog posts
- /about/ — About CyberCover / Cover4You
- /contact/ — Primary lead capture form
- /claims/ — Claims process and insurer contacts
- /privacy/ — Privacy policy
- /terms/ — Terms of service
- /disclaimer/ — Referral fee and general advice disclaimer

## Regulatory Bodies
- Office of the Privacy Commissioner (OPC) — privacy breach notification
- Financial Markets Authority (FMA) — FMCA licensed advisors
- Insurance Council of NZ (ICNZ) — Fair Practice standards
- CERT NZ — cyber threat reporting and guidance
- FSCL / IFSO — dispute resolution schemes
